content: Hello! How can I help you learn more about Santosh?

Hello. How can I help you learn more about Santosh's experience, skills, or projects today?

Santosh Rawat is a B.Sc. IT student with experience in web development, AI-assisted applications, and OCR systems. He has worked on various projects, including Foodland, HomeSphere, and a Banking Interest Rate Extraction System. His skills include HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, and GSAP.

Santosh has skills in:

1. Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, GSAP
2. Backend (basic): Node.js, REST APIs, authentication
3. Programming: Java, R
4. AI & OCR: LangChain, FAISS, embeddings, vector databases, OCR tools
5. Web scraping: Requests, BeautifulSoup, PDF & image parsing
6. Design & animation: GSAP, ScrollTrigger, SplitType, hero animations, loaders, carousel systems
7. Tools & workflow: VS Code, GitHub, npm, Vite, Git

He is also proficient in Nepali, English, and Hindi languages.
I am Santosh's Personal AI Assistant.
